bodySnippet: My Work Locations Self Service My Locations Add A Work Location Open this on your phone and tap Use my location to capture your exact spot with GPS, or drag the pin. Locations you add here are submitted for approval and only used for check-in once approved. Location Name* Radius (m)* Latitude* Longitude* Location on map Use my location + − Leaflet | © OpenStreetMap contributors Drag the pin (or click the map) to set the exact spot.
